prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The field condition for Overcurrent device selection & coordination is compared with the referenced drawing or manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, and layout callouts line up with the installed work, and the revision block shown is current. Reference material on hand: NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings.
title: Document check: Overcurrent device selection & coordination (commercial project)
